title: glandularia laciniata
intro: Glandularia laciniata, also known as Rock Pink or Rose Moss, is a flowering perennial plant native to the Americas, characterized by its pink or white flowers and divided leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Glandularia laciniata include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, as well as its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. Glandularia laciniata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
